summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of iteration 2 features completed. All 9 new features passed: global filter bar with season/conference/team selects, team-highlight thread across Q2/Q5/Q6, nav layout fix, and scroll-margin-top for hash navigation. No console errors, no React warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: FilterProvider context properly implemented with season/conference/team state
applyFilters and applySeasonConf helpers correctly filter dataset
Team dropdown correctly repopulates when conference changes
Q2 spotlight card shows all required metrics (Avg Top Player, Avg Top 3, Rank, Seasons)
Scatter component highlightTeam prop correctly highlights selected team dots in yellow
Q6 archetype cards show '★ TEAM APPEARS HERE' text when team is in that quadrant
Nav layout uses flex with gap-6 and max-w-[1500px] - no overlap at 1920x900
scroll-margin-top properly offsets sections below sticky nav+filter bar
test_credentials: No authentication required - public read-only site
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 added global FilterProvider context, FilterBar component, team-highlight thread across Q2/Q5/Q6, and nav layout fixes. All features working correctly.

nav_layout.details: Nav renders with logo (data-testid='nav-logo'), 11 center links (nav-link-hero through nav-link-conclusion), and START button (nav-cta). At 1920x900 viewport: logo ends at x=411, first link at x=487 (77px gap), last link ends at x=1534, CTA at x=1611 (77px gap). No overlap.

filter_bar.details: Filter bar (data-testid='filter-bar') is sticky below nav. Contains filter-season, filter-conference, filter-team selects. filter-status shows 'Showing all data' by default, 'Filters active' when any filter is set.

season_filter.details: Selecting 2023 via filter-season updates Q1 eyebrow to include '2023', changes filter-status to 'Filters active', shows filter-clear button.

conference_filter.details: Selecting SEC via filter-conference repopulates team dropdown with 15 SEC teams including Alabama. Q1/Q2/Q4/Q5/Q6 content filters accordingly.

team_selection_spotlight.details: Selecting Alabama triggers Q2 spotlight (data-testid='q2-spotlight') showing: Avg Top Player 28.0%, Avg Top 3 49.9%, Rank #8/14, Seasons (2021: 27.6% · 2022: 27.6% · 2023: 28.8%).

team_highlight_q5.details: Q5 scatters (q5-scatter-top, q5-scatter-top3) highlight Alabama dots in yellow with larger radius and white stroke.

team_highlight_q6.details: Q6 scatter (q6-archetypes) highlights Alabama dots. Star-Driven Winners archetype card shows '★ ALABAMA APPEARS HERE' text with yellow border accent.

clear_buttons.details: filter-clear resets all three filters. q2-spotlight-clear clears only team selection. Both work correctly.

hash_navigation.details: Clicking nav links scrolls to target section. scroll-margin-top properly offsets sections (Q3 section top at 120px, header height 117px). Sections not obscured by sticky nav+filter bar.

existing_testids.details: All existing data-testids render: hero-section, overview-section, cleaning-section, cleaning-funnel, design-section, q1-section through q6-section, conclusion-section.

console_errors.details: No console errors, no React warnings.
